item.title: Snapchat+ tops 25M subscribers, driving company’s direct revenue ARR to $1B
item.description: The revenue milestone comes as Snap has added additional paid offerings outside of its core Snapchat+ subscription over the past year to diversify its...

item.title: Google adds music generation capabilities to the Gemini app
item.description: Users will be able to use text, images, and videos as a reference to generate music

item.title: Kana emerges from stealth with $15M to build flexible AI agents for marketers
item.description: Kana, a new AI marketing startup from the founders of Rapt and Krux, has raised $15 million to build customizable, agent-based marketing tools.

item.title: This former Microsoft PM thinks she can unseat CyberArk in 18 months
item.description: Though crowded, the identity management market seems eager for new solutions, and Venice is finding traction.

item.title: Microsoft says Office bug exposed customers’ confidential emails to Copilot AI
item.description: Microsoft said the bug meant that its Copilot AI chatbot was reading and summarizing paying customers' confidential emails, bypassing data protection ...
